title: Water Services Regulation Authority (Ofwat) annual report and accounts 2021 to 2022
text:
Water Services Regulation Authority (Ofwat) annual report and accounts, for the period 1 April 2021 to 31 March 2022.

This paper was laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons.

Water Services Regulation Authority (Ofwat) annual report and accounts 2021 to 2022

Ref: ISBN 978-1-5286-3292-8, HC 196 2021-22

PDF
, 
3.5 MB
, 
157 pages

Order a copy

 If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email

. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
description: Water Services Regulation Authority (Ofwat) annual report and accounts - April 2021 to March 2022.
